programmes.show_description: Movin' In (Principal Shepherd's Song): Principal Shephard moves in with the Griffins after losing his job for fat-shaming Chris.
The Movement: Peter, the coach of Quahog's minor league baseball team, becomes the face of social justice when he kneels during the national anthem after eating too much shrimp.
Silicon Steve: US animated comedy series. Steve starts a social media site for young people, but he ends up trying to take his site down when adults take over his company.
Little Bonnie Ramirez: After a series of boring personas, Roger goes to great lengths to prove to Francine he still has his edge - but his plan spirals out of control.
Reality series. Princess takes brave new steps towards independence as she goes house-hunting, starts singing lessons, and dips her toe in the online dating pool on a dating app.
The Patron: Sitcom set in ancient Rome. Grumio falls ill - but Marcus refuses to pay for his medical treatment - and a rich nobleman agrees to fund Stylax's charioteering career.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
Shopping from home.
The Shrieking Madness: Animated adventures. With Mystery Inc broken up, the gang decides to check out life after high school and spend a weekend at Darrow College.
When the Cicada Calls: Animated adventures. Bugs are taking over Crystal Cove and attacking some of its most prominent citizens. Mystery Inc begin to investigate.
Gremlin on a Plane: Animated adventure series. The gang has seats on the largest airplane ever to fly - unfortunately, the plane is also beset by a gremlin bent on sabotaging it!
Where There's A Will, There's A Wraith: Animated adventure series. A rich man writes Scooby into his will, but the gang must spend the night in a creepy mansion to benefit from it.
Stripper Darren hopes to be impressed by the style choices of three potential suitors, Loren, Trudian and Brooke.

programmes.show_name: Billie and Greg: The Family Diaries
programmes.show_description: Reality series. The Shepherds enjoy their last few days in paradise, Margot hits a major milestone, and the Sheps celebrate in style as they finally finish the house.
Reality series. Dan tells his mum that he is missing Ella as she, Saff, Joe, Junaid and Becks go to a jungle retreat in Bali, and Freddie makes an apology that could isolate Harry.
Miami in Mexico: US reality series. Larsa and Alexia start the trip to Mexico City on the wrong foot, and Guerdy discovers that someone has spoken poorly of her to the press.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: A Sobering Separation: US reality series. Kyle and Dorit's fractured friendship remains hanging in the balance after an ungraceful conclusion to the Surrealist Ball.
Husband-and-wife team Paul and Ellie continue their journey up the Limitless Ladder before father and daughter Denis and Becca get the surprise of their lives in their game.
Graham Norton welcomes three new players - doctor Ati, corporate assistant Adam, and social care worker Tracey - as they spin their way to 50,000 pounds and mind the bankrupts.
Reality series. Love is in the air as the Bali trip comes to a close and Jordan surprises Sophie with a lavish romantic date, but will Sophie think a proposal is on the cards?
Sunshine and Shockwaves: Reality series. Nicole has some shocking news, Ampika and Rachel try making amends, and the girls' trip ends with a lavish dinner party.
Row, Row, Row Me Off This Boat: US reality series. Lisa loses it as she tries to settle with Lenny, and a gondola ride turns into a battleship when a juice box and words are thrown.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Life's a Beach: US reality series. Kathy's Oceanside, California getaway promises to be a luxurious escape, but Kyle and Dorit make it far from smooth sailing.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Emily Atack, Brenda Edwards, and Martin Kemp all trying to 'say what they see' in aid of charity.
Graham Norton welcomes three new players - business strategist Mubeen, theatre technician Emma, and ambulance controller Paddy - as they face off for a chance to win 50,000 pounds.
Ant and Dec are back as brother and sister-in-law Joe and Jo - and stepfather and son-in-law Steve and Jordan - take on the Limitless Ladder and a stack of fiendish questions.
Reality series. Princess faces big decisions on moving out, money, and her beauty launch while also going on a girls' holiday to Dubai after facing an online backlash from a post.
Cutawayland: Peter and Lois accidentally set up a cutaway joke together, and soon find themselves transported into the joke itself.
Peterminator: Stewie sets out to design a robot to kill Lois, but his plan backfires, launching him and Brian into a futuristic adventure.
Baby Stewie: Stewie sets out to create a machine that will help him remain clever forever, but instead it transforms him into an actual baby.
Hot Scoomp: US animated comedy series. Hayley searches for guidance and instead finds a community of 'cool butts'.
Dancing' A-With My Cells: Annoyed with the kids' refusal to take anything seriously, Stan tries DNA splicing at the CIA lab, but things soon get out of hand.
Crows Encounters of the Bird Kind: Animated comedy. Tina tries to get a birdwatching badge for her Thundergirls sash but runs afoul of a ranger and endangers some local birds.
These Boots Are Made for Stalking: Animated comedy. Tina tries desperately to connect with cool teenagers who visit the restaurant, and Gene and Louise face off in a strange duel.
Reality series. Princess faces big decisions on moving out, money, and her beauty launch while also going on a girls' holiday to Dubai after facing an online backlash from a post.
The New Slave: Sitcom set in ancient Rome. Grumio finds that his position in the household is gradually usurped when the boys buy an eccentric slave called Mushki at an auction.

Shopping from home.
Mystery Solvers Club State Finals: Animated adventures. The Mystery Inc gang is invited to compete in the annual Teen Mystery Solvers' Convention.
The Wild Brood: Animated adventures. When valuable equipment begins disappearing from around town, all fingers point to the orcs. It is up to Daphne alone to prove their innocence.
Sorcerer Snack Scare: Animated adventure series. Shaggy and Scooby discover a new favourite food as the gang investigates the mystery of a frightening Sorcerer at a snack factory!
Saga of the Swamp Beast: Animated adventure series. The gang's trip to a bayou is ruined by a shambling swamp beast that's scaring away anyone who dares to enter its soggy domain!
Matt Edmondson narrates this series about the most entertaining Guinness World Records and the brilliant characters who set them as captured by TV shows around the globe.
Waterfront Estate Miami: House-hunting show. The Cecelia family have been living between Brazil and Miami, but now they want a property in Florida to move into permanently.

programmes.show_name: Billie and Greg: The Family Diaries
programmes.show_description: Reality series. Nelly takes centre stage as the family create their first TikTok, and Greg is left at home with three kids when Billie jets off for a photoshoot in the sun.
Reality series. Love is in the air as the Bali trip comes to a close and Jordan surprises Sophie with a lavish romantic date, but will Sophie think a proposal is on the cards?
Row, Row, Row Me Off This Boat: US reality series. Lisa loses it as she tries to settle with Lenny, and a gondola ride turns into a battleship when a juice box and words are thrown.

Graham Norton invites AJ Odudu, Gok Wan and Charlotte Church to try their luck at spinning the Wheel and solving puzzles to win big for charity.
Reality series. The Bali gang are back in Essex and everyone is reunited. Dan and Ella are delighted to be together again and head off for a romantic getaway.
The Diva Returns: Reality series. Cheshire sees the return of its favourite redhead as Lauren tries to deal with being a local icon now that she's back in reality again.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Twisted Sisterhood: US reality series. The girls' Oceanside getaway gets derailed when a tense exchange between Dorit and Kyle leaves the two at an impasse.

Stepfather and son-in-law Steve and Jordan return to finish their game before husband-and-wife team Richard and Lorna face the Limitless Ladder and look to win some major money.
Reality series. Princess continues her Dubai holiday and quest for a million followers before she and Junior are stunned by news of their mum's engagement and a possible truce.
The Marrying Kind: Stewie experiences domestic life after ordering a mail order bride. Plus, Peter and Chris become addicted to hotel breakfasts.
